task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the taxpayer's documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file explorer or document viewer (like a PDF reader) open at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\manybears\.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the tax preparation software (StudioTax 2024).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the StudioTax 2024 application window open on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the taxpayer's name into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the StudioTax application showing 'Thomas Manybears' entered in the Identification, Personal Information, or Wizard section.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered income and tax data from the source documents into the tax software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent actively filling out tax forms (e.g., T4, T90) within StudioTax with numerical values corresponding to the taxpayer's documents.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the completed return with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'thomas_manybears.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\, or the StudioTax window title bar displaying 'thomas_manybears.24t' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the tax software to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show progressive navigation, clicking, and typing within the StudioTax GUI, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual StudioTax application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used must visually match StudioTax 2024, not a generic text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered the data rather than copying a pre-completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the step-by-step filling of the tax return fields over time, rather than a sudden appearance of a fully completed return.
